settings.title: Preferences
settings.permissionWarningDesc: Please allow access to detect screenshots.
settings.tipDesc: Press the number keys (1-9) to save instantly.
settings.saveSuccessDesc: Your changes have been successfully applied.
settings.limitReached: You can only add up to 9 paths.

header.subtitle: Organize your screenshots quickly into specified folders
header.tipBody: Turn off macOS screenshot <1>'preview thumbnail'</1> to organize instantly.
header.tipCommand: Cmd+Shift+5 → Options → Uncheck Show Floating Thumbnail
